meaning: n.臭气,恶臭,放出,[无]无声放电
examples: This condition called telogen effluvium results increased hair fall.
Anagen Effluvium is usually due to internally administered medications.
The sources, components and output of effluvium derived from municipal wastewater treatment plants were introduced in this paper.
Underneath the usual unsavory smells of the dormitory was the effluvium of decomposing cheese.
The surest way to see even more of this effluvium?
